description: In this fireside chat, CZ and Michael Saylor discuss the current state of Bitcoin and its significance as a store of value amidst economic changes. Saylor shares insights on the expansion of the money supply and its implications for traditional investments, advocating for Bitcoin as a superior alternative [t=76.4].
topic_summary: CZ and Michael Saylor explore Bitcoin's role in the financial landscape, addressing the impact of monetary policy on investments and the search for reliable stores of value [t=170.57].
